remarks: Very Rare 3 Bedroom Canaan Close Townhouse. Only a total of 3 of these units exist. Newly painted and ready for a new owner. Large Living room with fireplace, very spacious primary suite and custom designed stairs make this townhome special and unique. Outside you have a deck with pond views and the finished lower level has a walkout patio space for your grilling pleasure.Just minutes from the heart of downtown New Canaan, this beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath end-unit condominium offers the perfect combination of convenience, privacy, and low-maintenance living. With approximately 2,200 square feet across the first and second floors, plus a spacious finished lower level, there is plenty of room for both everyday living and entertaining.  As a desirable south-facing end unit, the home is filled with natural light throughout the day, creating bright, welcoming spaces in every room. Freshly painted and move-in ready, the main living areas flow seamlessly and offer exceptional flexibility for today's lifestyle.  Outside, enjoy a beautifully landscaped setting overlooking a peaceful pond with a soothing water feature that creates a tranquil backdrop year-round. Residents also enjoy access to the community pool, a wonderful amenity that enhances the easy, carefree lifestyle this location offers.  The finished lower level provides valuable additional living space, ideal for a family room, home office, gym, or playroom. All of this is just moments from New Canaa
